name: 🔥 Speed Demon Racing
desc: Ultimate racing experience with insane speeds!
longDesc: Speed Demon Racing is an adrenaline-pumping racing game. Master drifting, use nitro strategically, and unlock 50+ high-performance cars.

name: 💥 Combat Arena FPS
desc: Intense first-person shooter with tactical gameplay
longDesc: Step into the battlefield with Combat Arena FPS. Choose classes, customize weapons, fight in 5v5 matches.

name: 🎯 Archery Master
desc: Precision archery game with stunning environments
longDesc: Test your aiming skills in Archery Master. Shoot arrows across beautiful landscapes.

name: 🗺 Epic Quest RPG
desc: Embark on an epic journey in this fantasy RPG
longDesc: Enter a world of magic and monsters in Epic Quest RPG. Create your hero, complete hundreds of quests.

name: 👊 Street Brawler
desc: Classic fighting game with unique characters
longDesc: Choose your fighter and unleash devastating combos in Street Brawler. Master the art of combat.

name: 🚁 Sky Wings
desc: Soar through the skies in this thrilling flight simulator
longDesc: Experience the thrill of flight in Sky Wings. Pilot various aircraft, complete missions.
